titles_tesim: Record book of treaties with the Arab tribes of Mt. Sinai

full_text_tesim: Record book of treaties with the Arab tribes of Mt. Sinai
Summary record of treaties with the Arab tribes of Mt. Sinai in the form of a Calendar of Treaty Index. It does not contain texts or treaties
